_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Establish and/or maintain processes to ensure Responsible AI practices are reflected in an organization's approach to AI acquisition, development, and deployment.
reference_document_element_description: Develop and maintain responsible AI assessment tools, templates, and rubrics for use across the enterprise AI development lifecycle.
comments: DCWF task equal WIDAI AG domain. AG-T-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AG-T-005 (AG, cosine: 0.707), AG-A-003 (AG, cosine: 0.693).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 7.2/10 (raw 0.724). Shared vocabulary: [ai, development, maintain, responsible]. DCWF-only terms [acquisition, approach, deployment, ensure, establish, organization] vs WIDAI-only terms [across, assessment, develop, enterprise, lifecycle, rubrics] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.891 (P=0.890, R=0.891). Balanced P/R — the 21-word DCWF element and 18-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Establish and/or maintain processes to ensure Responsible AI practices are refle" and "Develop and maintain responsible AI assessment tools, templates, and rubrics for" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.731 ≈ STS 0.724 (gap 0.007). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [ai, development, maintain, responsible] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 16.1%. Shared tokens: [ai, development, maintain, responsible]. DCWF-only: [acquisition, approach, deployment, ensure, establish, organization]. WIDAI-only: [across, assessment, develop, enterprise, lifecycle, rubrics].
